summary: B6b: docker-compose.yml — add ollama service (ollama/ollama:latest, volume, port 11434) for dev bootstrap

resolution.note: docker-compose.yml: added ollama service (ollama/ollama:latest, port 11434, ollama_models volume, container_name guru-ollama). README dev bootstrap updated with the one-time pull command (docker exec guru-ollama ollama pull nomic-embed-text:v1.5). Pull persists across restarts.
